name: atomic-testing-ts7
description: Local marketplace: TypeScript 7 native (tsc) LSP for the atomic-testing monorepo.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp-native
plugins.description: TypeScript 7 native LSP — runs `pnpm exec tsc --lsp --stdio` (the Go-native TS 7 language server, installed as @typescript/native) over stdio, spawned per-project by Claude. Gives go-to-definition, find-references, implementations, and live diagnostics on the same engine the repo's check:type gate already uses.
